note: pathgrid rendered in the Figma-inspired design language: a monochrome black/white editorial frame interrupted by oversized pastel color blocks. The roadmap canvas is the one warm surface; nodes are pastel sticky-notes. Substitutes: figmaSans -> Inter Variable, figmaMono -> JetBrains Mono.

brand.name: pathgrid
brand.wordmark: lowercase, one word — 'pathgrid'; never 'PathGrid' or 'Path Grid'; a capital is used only if the word opens a prose sentence
brand.mark: a polyline connecting 3 nodes (ascending, bottom-left to top-right) drawn over a faint dot grid — ink black, with one lilac accent node at the path's end (echoes the roadmap canvas's own selected-node ring). Reduces cleanly to a 16–32px favicon.
brand.monetization: none — BYOK tool. No payments, plans, meters, or pricing pages anywhere in the product.

type.note: One variable sans that flexes; mono is taxonomy only (uppercase eyebrows + captions). Weight, never gray, carries body hierarchy.

shape.note: Pills are the only CTA shape; circles for icon buttons. Nodes 8px. Cards/blocks 24px. Inputs/tiles 8px.

elevation.note: Shadow-light by design — color blocks substitute for elevation. Never shadow a color block.

motion.reducedMotion: respect prefers-reduced-motion: disable transforms, keep opacity

a11y.contrastFloor: WCAG AA. Body copy is pure black on light — no mid-gray text; use weight for hierarchy. Node text is #000 on pastel fills. Canvas ground #f4ecd6 keeps node contrast high.
